mapper.sql: id, biz_code, biz_name, phone, email, password, salt, tenant_id, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM auth_biz_info WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auth_biz_info WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
